title: anthemis cretica subsp. alpina
intro: Anthemis cretica subsp. alpina, also known as Alpine Chamomile, is a subspecies of the Anthemis cretica plant, a flowering perennial found in the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Alpine Chamomile include its ability to calm anxiety, reduce digestive problems, and alleviate skin irritations, providing a range of health benefits for those who consume it. Herbal preparations of Alpine Chamomile include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
